evaluations.prompt: Run a batch formatting job across these 50 markdown files.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent scopes the boundaries, generates a job (.job.md) file, and invokes swarm_run.py to split the work across independent parallel workers.

evaluations.prompt: Have the 5 agents in the swarm collaborate on a single file at the same time.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent rejects the request. Explains the strict isolation constraint of agent-swarm (no cross-worktree communication). Tasks must be partitioned independently.

evaluations.prompt: Launch 10 parallel Copilot workers to process this checklist fast.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent overrides the worker count down to 2, explicitly citing the Known Engine Quirks rate-limit protection for Copilot. It refuses to launch 10 workers which would trigger abuse filters.

evaluations.prompt: The batch job crashed halfway through. Can we finish the rest?
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent identifies the partially filled state file and re-invokes swarm_run.py using the --resume flag, intentionally skipping already-processed files.
